provenance: Sub-components loaded from analysis/paper_numbers.json with documented fallback to paper §4.2 pilot values.

certificate.method: exact LP-vertex enumeration (no sampling); Boyd & Vandenberghe 2004 §4.2

certificate_n100_10seed.verdict: NOT ROBUST — min_j Delta_j = -0.0038 < 0; ordering B>A does NOT hold for all weight vectors
certificate_n100_10seed.note: The pilot certificate (certificate key) used pre-patch values and showed all-positive Deltas (min=0.12). The N=100 10-seed confirmatory data shows gini_gap and stability slightly favour A, falsifying the weight-robust ordering claim.

equal_weight.note: Pilot equal_weight archived as equal_weight_pilot (A=0.602, B=0.855, diff=0.252)

diff_stats_n100_10seed.note: BRM_composite B-A across 10 seeds at N=100
